microsoft_ft: Architected Azure's **end-to-end recovery validation platform**, scaling from a 2-person operation to a self-service system sustaining 45+ annual resilience drills and delivering **$14M+ in measurable value** across enterprise clients including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led 0→1 solution design for an internal **Resilience Automation Platform**, translating abstract business requirements into functional product configurations and self-service scheduling capabilities that reduced operational toil by 30% across client engagements.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive rack-level resilience testing capability, delivering a **94% recovery rate** in 4 months by architecting reusable validation patterns and establishing design best practices adopted across subsequent enterprise engagements.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract, aligning engineering, product, and client stakeholders on solution feasibility.

Built an internal AI agent and restructured planning workflows to reduce drill planning cycle time by **39%**, increasing capacity by 21% — modeling how automation can deliver measurable platform value at scale.

Acted as voice of the customer across enterprise partner integrations, synthesizing field insights from Walmart, SAP, and NetApp engagements to **influence product roadmap** priorities and establish scalable architectural standards for future deployments.
microsoft_2023: Drove **product adoption for AI-powered workflows**, leading client-facing demos and discovery sessions with 14 Azure service teams to surface integration gaps and accelerate utilization, saving 37 engineering hours monthly across the platform.

Shaped roadmap strategy by facilitating **11+ structured discovery sessions** with enterprise service teams, translating business requirements into an intent-based YAML generation feature that closed a critical gap in the product's solution design capabilities.

Improved solution scalability by implementing metadata standards and migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** tool, cutting lookup time by 83% and enabling reusable, discoverable design artifacts across engineering teams.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by architecting a unified automation prioritization framework, securing cross-functional alignment across 140+ teams on a shared solution design and implementation roadmap.

Conducted discovery workshops with 20+ service teams to model business processes, identifying **81 hours of manual effort** per region launch and building a product roadmap to automate critical paths — directly translating client needs into scalable platform improvements.

Engineered a **Power BI solution dashboard** to track and visualize operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to identify automation gaps, prioritize high-impact investments, and quantify measurable value delivered per engagement.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot by architecting the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping system dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and producing integration specifications and implementation roadmaps for cross-functional teams.

Facilitated Agile discovery ceremonies including sprint planning and stakeholder retrospectives, prioritizing a backlog of **40+ high-priority tickets** to stabilize the developer intake process and align engineering execution with business outcomes.

Drove cross-functional alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to design and implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and establishing reusable integration patterns for future platform rollouts.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by architecting an end-to-end CRM solution that standardized the scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals, translating business process inefficiencies into a scalable, repeatable workflow design.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by designing and executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing web and search presence to align solution narratives with target customer needs.

Delivered leadership a **profitability analysis framework** built on 1,000+ project records to model business processes, identify margin leaks, and inform pricing strategy — demonstrating ability to translate data insights into actionable product and business decisions.
